rule: These entries are navigation and planning records only. They do not authorize live account access, API calls, billing actions, content reads, writes, sends, exports, or client-data handling.

tools.business_purpose: Email, calendar, documents, identity, collaboration, and future Guided AI Labs workspace surfaces.
tools.windows_access_mode: browser-or-app-link; future approved Windows broker for M365-specific work
tools.linux_access_mode: browser-link only; no token or tenant secret transfer through DirectLink
tools.notes: Existing UAOS boundary keeps M365 planning-only until Adam approves inventory-only activation.

tools.business_purpose: Accounting, bookkeeping, invoices, expenses, taxes, and financial review surfaces.
tools.windows_access_mode: browser-link only until finance connector boundary exists
tools.linux_access_mode: browser-link only; no exports, tokens, or accounting files through DirectLink
tools.notes: No QuickBooks API, export, report, invoice, payment, or billing workflow is approved in this seed.

tools.business_purpose: Repositories, issues, pull requests, commits, release records, and source-of-truth workflow.
tools.access_status: existing-tooling; dry-run/default approval gates still apply
tools.notes: Use current UAOS GitHub adapter material as reference before any Rev 2 live adapter work.

tools.business_purpose: Knowledge lookup, graph snapshots, decisions, recommendations, and read-only UAOS handoff records.
tools.windows_access_mode: L: path reference and browser if service is running
tools.notes: Graphify remains the knowledge spoke; Rev 2 should not duplicate graph/chat/source-selection ownership.
